title: Fix reentry task lookup

tasks.title: Implement workflow-backed task-id lookup recovery.
tasks.verification: Reviewer found stale fast-path throws could bypass fallback and applied fix. GREEN after review: pnpm test -- src/tools/task.test.ts; pnpm run check; pnpm run build; pnpm test.
tasks.notes: Implemented workflow-backed task-id lookup recovery with full verification.

error_recovery.last_error: Initial regression failed with Task not found: tk-reentry before implementation.

attempts.error: pnpm test -- src/tools/task.test.ts failed on stale reverse-index fallback expectations.
attempts.diagnosis: resolveChangeId only used store.tasks.show, so task-id-only tools could not resolve workflow-visible tasks absent from taskChangeIndex/disk projection.
attempts.fix_tried: Added setCachedChange task indexing plus read-only active workflow task scan fallback; fixed test mock default isolation; reran targeted and full verification.

wisdom.content: For task-id-only tools, keep ownership recovery structural: fast-path task→change index/disk lookup, then fallback to typed workflow task arrays over active changes. Co-locate reverse-index hydration with workflow-state cache materialization (`setCachedChange`) so gate re-entry, task add refreshes, and other workflow reads maintain the same invariant.

Task lookup stale-index fallback must handle both null fast-path results and thrown fast-path lookups; an unavailable old workflow can otherwise block structural live-state resolution before the fallback scan runs.

proposal.approval_evidence: Proposal confirmed by user resume of remaining crash-recovery follow-ups.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery: inspected task-id resolution, taskChangeIndex, taskAddedSignal, change refresh, and task show/update paths. Root cause is stale/missing reverse task index for workflow-visible tasks.

design.approval_evidence: Design validator returned PASS_WITH_NOTES; incorporated primary setCachedChange indexing fix plus bounded fallback scan constraints.

planning.approval_evidence: Task graph approved under user's resume-all instruction: one implementation task with inline TDD covering AC1-AC5/C1-C4.

execution.approval_evidence: All tasks done. Verification: targeted task/store tests, pnpm run check, pnpm run build, and full pnpm test passed.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User approved acceptance via chat: `approve`. Review matrix rows all pass/respected; targeted tests, check, build, and full suite are green.

items.text: `adv_task_show` can resolve a task that exists only in live workflow task state for an active change.
`adv_task_update` can resolve and mutate that same task without requiring a prior disk projection refresh.
Task cache/index population occurs structurally from workflow state, not from parsing chat/tool output.
Existing indexed and disk-backed task lookup tests still pass.
`pnpm run check`, `pnpm run build`, and full `pnpm test` pass.
Do not add direct ADV state-file reads.
Do not make archived/closed task lookup scan broad terminal history by default.
Preserve target_path routing semantics for task tools.
Task resolution fallback must be read-only until the caller explicitly performs its requested mutation.

rows.evidence: `plugin/src/tools/task.ts` resolveChangeId falls back from null/throwing `store.tasks.show` to active workflow `changeTasksQuery`; tests in `plugin/src/tools/task.test.ts` cover adv_task_show null and throwing fast-path fallbacks.
rows.notes: Reviewer PASS_WITH_NOTES; stale throw issue fixed.

rows.evidence: `adv_task_update` resolves via same fallback before firing existing mutation signal; tests cover null and throwing fast-path fallback before `taskAssignedSignal`.
`setCachedChange` hydrates taskChangeIndex from `ChangeWorkflowState.tasks`; fallback scans typed `Task[]` results from `changeTasksQuery`, not chat/tool-output text.
GREEN: `pnpm test -- src/tools/task.test.ts src/storage/store-temporal/index.test.ts`; GREEN after reviewer: `pnpm test -- src/tools/task.test.ts`.
GREEN after reviewer changes: `pnpm run check`; `pnpm run build`; `pnpm test`.
No direct ADV state-file reads added; code uses Store APIs and Temporal queries only.
Fallback uses default `store.changes.list()` and explicitly skips `archived`/`closed` statuses.
rows.notes: No terminal broad scan by default.

rows.evidence: Task tools continue resolving `activeStore` through `withOptionalTargetPathStore` / `withTargetPathStore`; fallback receives the same active store.
Fallback performs `store.changes.list`, `getHandleForChangeId`, and `changeTasksQuery`; mutation remains the caller's existing `fireSignalAndRefresh` path after ownership is resolved.
rows.notes: Reviewer fix also lets stale fast-path throws fall through without mutation.

acceptanceCriteria: `adv_task_show` can resolve a task that exists only in live workflow task state for an active change.
`adv_task_update` can resolve and mutate that same task without requiring a prior disk projection refresh.
Task cache/index population occurs structurally from workflow state, not from parsing chat/tool output.
Existing indexed and disk-backed task lookup tests still pass.
`pnpm run check`, `pnpm run build`, and full `pnpm test` pass.
